title: castilleja nubigena
intro: Castilleja nubigena, also known as sky pilot, is a rare alpine flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Castilleja nubigena include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Castilleja nubigena typically involve drying and infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or making a tincture, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or salves.
